project_structure.description: Agentic software factory template with saga-based orchestration for deterministic workflow execution using Devin CLI

subprojects.description: Core saga orchestration engine and Devin CLI wrapper for step execution
Individual step definitions with prompts, agent configs, and verification scripts
Saga workflow definitions in JSON format for graph-based orchestration

decisions.why: Defines current saga orchestration architecture with Devin CLI; this refactoring improves separation of concerns within the wrapper and orchestrator components
Defines future state persistence requirements; refactoring should enable cleaner session lifecycle management in orchestrator for better state tracking
Predecessor to saga orchestration; understanding skills pattern helps inform generic agent interface design

target_architecture.why: Defines target architecture for saga execution; refactoring maintains graph-based execution while improving component separation

components.why: Core component to refactor - currently handles CLI wrapping, instrumentation, verification, and state management; should be reduced to thin CLI adapter
Orchestrator component that delegates to wrapper; needs expansion to handle enrichment, session lifecycle, and verification invocation
Enrichment service that should be integrated into orchestrator workflow; currently not called during saga execution

services.why: Defines saga and node data structures; refactoring doesn't change models but may add new orchestrator service
Validates saga definitions; unchanged by refactoring but important for understanding saga execution flow

models.why: Root saga model; refactoring maintains same model structure
Node model for steps and sagas; refactoring doesn't change node structure
Context model for prompt enrichment; should be integrated into orchestrator workflow

apis.why: Current API that needs refactoring; should become thin CLI adapter with minimal side effects
Internal API that calls wrapper; should be updated to use new orchestrator interface

tests.why: Tests for wrapper; need updates after refactoring to thin CLI adapter
Tests for saga executor; need updates after orchestrator expansion
